business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial real estate investment and management — warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy number CP-BIP-2025-4420; effective 09/01/2025; prior year 2024 carrier

positives: Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring
Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors
Zero claims in prior three policy years (2022, 2023, 2024)
No policy cancellations in prior three years
concerns: LOC-007 (3250 Hill Avenue, Toledo, OH) is not sprinklered
Building is not fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R across all locations
Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) not maintained
No written contracts with all subcontractors
Plumbing last updated in 2015 (oldest system update)
Two manufacturing facilities in portfolio (LOC-004 and LOC-007)
LOC-004 built in 1992 and LOC-007 built in 1998 are older buildings
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: No claims reported in 2022, 2023, or 2024. No policy cancellations across all three prior years. Carriers include Chubb Limited (2022, $456,514.10 premium), Hartford Financial Services (2023, $419,914.35 premium), and Liberty Mutual Insurance (2024, $392,002.31 premium).

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Industrial real estate investment and management — warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio. Hours of Operation: Mon-Fri 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Sat 9:00 AM - 1:00 PM. 95 full-time employees, 18 part-time employees. Annual Revenue: $48,000,000. 31 years in business, 22 years with current management.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program in place. Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring. 24-hour doorperson or security on premises. Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors. EV charging stations not installed. Lockout/tagout procedures not in place. MSDS not maintained.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Zero claims across 2022, 2023, and 2024. No cancellations. Premiums have decreased year-over-year from $456,514.10 (2022, Chubb) to $419,914.35 (2023, Hartford Financial Services) to $392,002.31 (2024, Liberty Mutual Insurance).
